title: Jim Bambra
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Jim Bambra''' was a [[West End Games]] author who wrote ''[[Domain of Evil]]''. He is notable for having created [[Halagad Ventor]].

==Sources==
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Two]]''
*''[[Domain of Evil]]''
*''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]'' (Editor)

{{Bio-stub}}
